name: custom-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins, opt-in per project.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Academic writing toolkit (Chinese-first): native Chinese drafting via DeepSeek, AI-trace scrubbing, structural humanizer, CJK LaTeX/xeCJK build + visual audit, bibliography authenticity check, locked polish pipeline, and a PKU paper template.

plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.description: Audit, score, and auto-improve CLAUDE.md files. Forked from claude-plugins-official: the claude-md-improver skill now applies updates directly (no approval prompt) — revert via git if needed.
